data.content: Shipment blocked on 2026-03-11 while merging beat/foolery-02d0 (83a4f926f003) into main (61bb0efcc9f7): merge conflict in src/lib/backends/knots-backend.ts. Auto-merges succeeded in src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx, src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox.test.ts, and src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts, but the backend conflict needs a fresh implementation pass before shipment can continue.
